title: ContentOS
intent: Campaign planning, content lifecycle orchestration, and multi-channel publishing ops
requirements: campaigns module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
assets module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
calendar module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
reviews module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
distribution module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
performance module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
